case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. THE ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT THE ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE ALLEGHENY CASUALTY COMPANY $50,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $206.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $50,206.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER FOR STAY OF ENFORCEMENT ON SUMMARY JUDGMENT

NOTICE OF MOTION TO STAY ENFORCEMENT OF SUMMARY JUDGMENT FOR 180 DAYS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS HEARING SET FOR OCT-30-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, REAL PARTY IN INTEREST BALLESTRASSE BAIL BONDS MOTION TO STAY ENFORCEMENT OF SUMMARY JUDGMENT FOR 180 DAYS: NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED). (302/AJR/JU) COURT REPORTER PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-30-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
